items.title: Scheduled SolRadar Research Report Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This PR successfully publishes the scheduled SolRadar research cycle report for May 15, 2026, with a fully populated report body and machine-readable intents. Key updates include the completion of the report contract, detailed data source health diagnostics, and explicit decisioning updates based on Grok credibility verdict rules. The report captures candidate decisions and ensures compliance with the cycle's hard rules.
